name: Bill de Blasio
subject: What a night!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
We can win if we keep building support -- and that looks like every single supporter stepping up right now.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21ed0/1630b3eb/517d5376/5f54bf34/2808668871/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=710_org_em_fr")
Friend,
I just stepped off the live town hall stage at CNN. What a night!
This was a truly amazing experience to talk directly to Democrats across the country about what we can do for working people.
Sharing our "working people first" message was the easy part. This next part is harder: turning viewers who liked my message into real supporters. That means having the resources to keep reaching them with the record of progressive change we've achieved in New York City.
**[Contribute $1 right now to make sure this campaign has the resources to turn tonight's viewers into supporters.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21ed0/1630b3eb/517d5376/5f54bf34/2808668871/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=710_org_em_fr")**
Lots of candidates in this race have progressive ideas, but tonight I reminded our nation that I'm the only candidate who's actually taken progressive ideas and turned them into a reality for 8.6 million people. We can win if we keep building support -- and that looks like every single supporter stepping up right now.
Thanks in advance,
Bill

[CONTRIBUTE»](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21ed0/1630b3eb/517d5376/5f54bf34/2808668871/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=710_org_em_fr")
---

PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you'd like to unsubscribe, you can click [_here_](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21ed0/1630b3eb/517d5376/5f54bf3e/2808668871/VEsP/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/unsubscribe"), but we'd hate to see you go. Learn more about [Bill's campaign](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21ed0/1630b3eb/517d5376/5f54bf3d/2808668871/VEsHBQ/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://billdeblasio.com/") here.

| Automation has already destroyed millions of American jobs and will destroy a million more. And there’s nothing we can do to stop it. It’s an existential threat.

**Having said that -- I am an optimist. You don’t start organizations and run for President if you’re not.**

We’ve got problems, there’s no denying that. But there are solutions and they definitely don’t include building a wall, bringing back old jobs, or making anything great again.

We have to turn the clock forward.

We have to accelerate our economy and society as fast as possible. We have to evolve in the way we see work and value. We can arrest the decline of our civilization, but only if we take bold action and we take it fast.

I’m not holed up in my basement waiting for the waters or the economy to overtake me and my family. **I’ve got two young boys and I’ll be damned if I just rest while the future I see coming up just overtakes us all.**

[But I can’t do it alone. I need you on my team and I need your support. Will you consider chipping in $5 today as a way of showing you’re still with me in this fight?](http://trk.klclick.com/wf/click?upn=-2BIAqDMuImSGKgCGE2sotQ02lV0-2B-2FAsZCh9lzrV5waF336SCiCpNhiC1bHSNpM7K2w9G0x-2B0-2FbBPigXUkxvsXV3nEHGNSkBPzLnLAzVRhcvWG1EvqBaqTSU28zc1UDMWBFY-2BjeYZPv6eVlHOkzZ6-2B8fR2oMfWQWKHO6VQ-2BKvRhRck6Lr6yuQPou05Bsn5yminjcayenWC9PRjtNcvcb2CqJDAftr-2FARfhycJ0U2rIlPpl5f6FvALOgqA9PklRkTiv2UX3ScLB9BvuCbGaSueuafbtcp9sCHyqGleQKlnH09w-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2FeTFRRX4rCbqyIBoxQWmhX1RwQGcenSlyWpA3Tcg14Ka97jQ9G-2FicEwvLRso-2FUwGCUVpNHW-2FDz5Txb6ltJRFIafmXZ80A0NyGov3-2F9xhYLFoLI3lhLz-2BYTV6RmUOZfGtCeD5H1Pp8MZ61lFGtKPEEmtvYMgPYSRd5aGNIxiYlaF4VP2xzraRchzj70M4t9jwa00h-2FJc86SabD0-2Bzu4rQpRrGX6PGD4D7t9tKrxcSildXNKxZEdrfLrn0khqFqgqtu-2BPMvYMc0b08JWzocZfB6Pjd3z4nDGUi-2FQHqjv3L9V9o8IT3ByxdCEZn52D1XFT0-2F9zrrb9rL1b2ek2J2yyM3OQ-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | | | We wanted to make sure you saw Andrew’s note from this morning. So far today over 2,000 people have already pitched in -- and we would love to share with him tomorrow morning that we hit 3,000. | | | Friend -- | Automation has already destroyed millions of American jobs and will destroy a million more. And there’s nothing we can do to stop it. It’s an existential threat. Having said that -- I am an optimist. You don’t start organizations and run for President if you’re not. We’ve got problems, there’s no denying that. But there are solutions and they definitely don’t include building a wall, bringing back old jobs, or making anything great again. We have to turn the clock forward. We have to accelerate our economy and society as fast as possible. We have to evolve in the way we see work and value. We can arrest the decline of our civilization, but only if we take bold action and we take it fast. I’m not holed up in my basement waiting for the waters or the economy to overtake me and my family. I’ve got two young boys and I’ll be damned if I just rest while the future I see coming up just overtakes us all. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | \- Andrew Yang | ****Join the Yang Gang! If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application and someone from our team will reach out. | | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang | All rights reserved. New York, NY #HumanityFirst | No longer want to receive these emails? . Friends of Andrew Yang

The Liberal Mob and Fake News media are absolutely unhinged. They're spewing LIES and slandering President Trump's administration every chance they get in the hopes of dividing our Nation.

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: HUGE opportunity (gifts matched)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
August is coming to a close, and we're a little short of the number of donations we had projected.
We're about to ask a group of supporters to make their first donation to help protect New Hampshire's Democratic Senate seat so that we can close the gap, and there's a really important way you can help:
**If you donate $25, we 'll use it as a match fund to inspire five people to make their very first $5 donation. [Will you help out? $25 would be amazing but if you're able to give a bit more, it would be incredibly helpful. And if $1 is what works for you, we'd really appreciate that too.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3bc/2a380d31/3c16edc7/f0c3ea/655160717/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9iZS10aGUtbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDgyNl9iZXRoZW1hdGNoMV9yby1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_be-the-match?refcode=e20190826_bethematch1_ro-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**
With Donald Trump laser-focused on New Hampshire (he was just here earlier this month rallying support for Republicans), we're doing everything we can to make sure that anyone on the fence about donating to support Democrats ultimately gets involved.
[**Look at it this way: By making a matching gift today, you could be the reason that someone makes their very first donation toward protecting this vulnerable Senate seat.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3bc/2a380d31/3c16edc7/f0c3ea/655160717/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9iZS10aGUtbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDgyNl9iZXRoZW1hdGNoMV9yby1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_be-the-match?refcode=e20190826_bethematch1_ro-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
You have an opportunity to make an enormous impact, everyone, and we'd be so grateful if you got involved.
Thank you so much,
Maggie Hassan's campaign staff
> [Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3bc/2a380d31/3c16edc7/f0c3ea/655160717/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9iZS10aGUtbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDgyNl9iZXRoZW1hdGNoMV9yby1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_be-the-match?refcode=e20190826_bethematch1_ro-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Did you see my invitation for Friday, September 6 in Wayne
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Friend,

I wanted to make sure you had seen the invitation to the reception at Margaret Kuo's Restaurant on Friday, September 6th at 6:30 p.m.

If you would please attend, more details can be found in the invitation below. To RSVP and donate online please click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reception090619] .

Please come to meet with me and understand why our message is inspiring passionate support across Iowa with our grassroots campaign of accountability and my Plan for America.

I hope to see you there on Friday, September 6th!

Respectfully,
Joe

--------------------------
Rob Armstrong, George Badey, Ed Chacker, Shelly Chauncey,
Mark and Karin Cofone, Andrea and Mark D’Ambra, Ken Dilloway, Larry Frame, Margaret Goodman, Grant Grissom, Elayne Howard, Bob Jarvis, Scott Jenkins, Janet Lis, Kevin Madden, William C. Miller, William E. Miller, Esq., David Moldoff, Jack Nachamkin, Gary Neights, Abu and Shelly Rahman, Richard Sternhell, Mark Turner & Ava Zandi

Cordially invite you to a Fundraiser reception to support
Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak

Pat Rynard of Iowa Starting Line [https://iowastartingline.com/2019/07/29/the-peculiar-surprisingly-effective-campaign-of-joe-sestak/] wrote that since announcing his candidacy June 23, former 3-star Admiral Joe Sestak has spent his time getting to know the people of Iowa and “has a unique story... Sestak is certainly the only person in the field who can say things like, ‘When I arrived in the Arabian Sea with my carrier battle group to begin the strikes against Afghanistan.’” The editorial board of the Des Moines Register [https://www.desmoinesregister.com/story/opinion/editorials/2019/07/30/joe-sestak-impresses-experience-and-discipline-editorial/1826416001/] said, “[This] retired Navy admiral and former congressman impresses with experience, smarts and discipline....”

Vox called him [https://www.vox.com/policy-and-politics/2019/8/13/20680106/joe-sestak-2020-presidential-campaign-policies-admiral-navy-specter-obama-medicare-public-option] a “maverick” and “an anti-establishment Democrat who has beaten a Republican in a Republican district, he’s someone with military and foreign policy experience, and he has a deeply personal reason for his approach to health care reform: This is his record and he’s running on it.” National Review called him [https://www.nationalreview.com/2019/08/joe-sestak-most-interesting-democrat-you-forgot-was-running/] “the most interesting Democrat” in the race.
Joe aims to build a coalition that brings together Democrats, Independents and Republicans, appealing to a sense of greater national purpose, above party, to heal our nation’s soul. He believes that a nation that can “disagree well” is a nation that can begin to overcome its rifts and tackle our greatest challenges.

Joe is an experienced, independent leader who served in the Navy for 31 years , including in the White House as Director of Defense Policy for President Clinton, and in Congress when he represented Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District – a nearly 2-to-1 Republican district.

An independent-minded public servant, Joe refused to let former Republican Arlen Specter – who tried to humiliate Anita Hill during her testimony on sexual harassment by now-Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas – run unopposed for the Senate. Joe beat the odds to win the primary.

Please come to hear why Joe inspires such passionate support across Iowa with his grassroots campaign and Plan for America [https://www.joesestak.com/plan-for-america/] . Check out JoeSestak.com [https://www.joesestak.com] .

Friday, September 6th, 6:30 p.m.
Margaret Kuo's Restaurant, 175 Lancaster Ave, Wayne, PA
Requested Contribution Levels:
Sponsor: $2800 Patron: $1000
Supporter: $500 Friend: $250 Backer: $100

To RSVP or contribute for this event, click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reception090619]
You can also contribute by bringing a check to the reception or by mailing a check
payable to "Joe Sestak for President" to Joe Sestak for President, PO Box 17246, Alexandria, VA 22302
Questions: Email reception@joesestak.com

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President

Joe Sestak for President
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States

name: Robert Foster
subject: An important message
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Njadh_ikXbmS2HgtyR2_cK8YE8XkE4d7HMdj-XUS6zOWezNqmyv2_pqVoFlFVAzv2aHxOH_JZCwIR9vlRrm331JHOV9h1M1P0ot5BfJzhNbPT0OQsF-2Edh247TpIv7drTi-VvkXb_LRqc22B0_eGHsv__M_AH8mEYbsZEBLrl54hq6bsRHtCypxTG5lsbgKtXr0H1rCdmgA0V7smdNM8Np8CK_C-YUJ&c=DfrHDsjC4IyR1OEbWZ-sw6pM8F3809U_K0ei145LcNpkKmYGqKLChQ==&ch=qH1Dy-Ug8p2735fqnoJF4afMR0bi_Aqiy-ucFX-i7LPcZV1Ep7SE9Q==)
---
| |
---
| Enough is Enough.
We are writing to set the record straight on a letter that you might have recently received from some Republicans in our state.
We feel compelled to express our disappointment with the irresponsible and false allegations made in this letter that was designed to personally attack Bill Waller in his run for Governor.
While we all should have the freedom to choose our candidate and maintain the right to disagree, for any Republican in our state to claim that Bill is "carrying the water for the Democrats" simply because he is addressing important issues--like infrastructure, education and health care--is reckless and wrong.
Bill Waller and many other Mississippi Republican elected officials, candidates and activists are promoting identical positions on these pressing issues that are completely consistent with the conservative principles of Ronald Reagan, Mike Pence and President Donald Trump.
In the recent history of the Mississippi Republican Party, it has been a key focus to support conservative judges because of the incredible importance and need to clean up our state's judicial system. Thankfully, because of conservative judges like Bill Waller and others, our judicial system is far better than it was in the past.
Many Republican leaders fought diligently for the right of the Party to have the ability to endorse judicial candidates, and it's important to note that the Party endorsed Bill Waller when he was running for Supreme Court--because of his outstanding, conservative record.
We are deeply concerned about the competitive nature of the upcoming general election and the strong gubernatorial candidate the Democrats have nominated.
That's one of the many reasons we have been supporting Bill Waller for Governor since the beginning of his campaign, and we continue to believe Bill Waller is the conservative Republican with the best opportunity to win in November.
I hope you will please consider joining us, and other Republicans including Billy Mounger and Leland Speed, in putting an end to the reckless personal attacks against Bill Waller, and you can do that by voting this Tuesday for a good man of integrity and a proven conservative record--Bill Waller for Governor.
Sincerely,
Jim Herring, Chairman of the Mississippi Republican Party, 2001-2008
Billy Powell, Chairman of the Mississippi Republican Party, 1993-1996
Clarke Reed, Chairman of the Mississippi Republican Party, 1966-1976
Mike Retzer, Chairman of the Mississippi Republican Party, 1978-1982, 1996-2001
Wirt Yerger, III

---
| |
---
| | |
---

As a proud NRA certified youth shotgun instructor, competitive shooter, and 4-H certified youth pistol instructor, Tiffany understands the importance of practicing her Second Amendment rights. That’s why the NRA gave Tiffany an A+ rating! Unlike Tom and his friends in The Squad, Tiffany will not stand for our gun rights to be taken away. Thank you for your support, Team Shedd Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: G-7 Summit: Trump Strikes 'Billion-Dollar' Trade Deal with Japan
body:
"A deal is all but sealed with Japan,” Fox Business reports. “It’s a very big transaction and we’ve agreed in principle." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0a773d3972&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **G-7 Summit: Trump Strikes 'Billion-Dollar' Trade Deal with Japan**

“A deal is all but sealed with Japan,” Fox Business reports. “It’s a very big transaction and we’ve agreed in principle,” President Donald J. Trump confirmed alongside Prime Minister Shinzo Abe after a meeting at the G-7 summit in Biarritz, France.

President Trump said the Prime Minister agreed to purchase large sums of American farmers’ corn and “expects the billion-dollar deal to be sealed by the time the U.N. General Assembly meets in mid-September.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cb32416c7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “America has the upper hand in the ongoing trade negotiations with China, and the temporary reprieve that President Trump recently gave the Chinese regime is only further proof that our strong economy grants us a degree of flexibility that Beijing can’t hope to match,” former CKE Restaurants CEO Andy Puzder and former Sen. Jim Talent (R-MO) write for [_RealClearPolitics_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f78b988cdb&e=3ee4985eea). “Our decision to finally get tough on trade with China is having far less of a negative impact on the U.S. economy than establishment American commentators and politicians predicted.”
---
|
---
| If you're wondering why people don't trust the media, look no further than CNN’s recent hiring of embattled former Deputy FBI Director Andrew McCabe, the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aabf0895d6&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes. “CNN has sent a clear message to those in government: If you lose your position of public trust because you lie under oath, you can always land a job at CNN — at least as long as your lie was for a good cause, such as the resistance to Trump, or presumably to whatever Republican presidents are elected in the future.”
---
|
---
| “Here’s some good and important news that got scant attention in much of the media: The Environmental Protection Agency recently released its annual Air Trends report, which found that air pollution across the U.S. continues to decline,” former EPA official Mandy Gunasekara writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aa5951c717&e=3ee4985eea). “It turns out that his administration’s pragmatic approach to the environment has provided a clearly measurable boost to both the economy and the air. Americans are breathing the cleanest air on record.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5bc00e4949&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4fdc9b3283&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=cee85e97ea)

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: It's Women's Equality Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
**The West Virginia Democratic Party released the following statement from Chairwoman Belinda Biafore on Women’s Equality Day:**
“ _On this day in 1920 women were granted the right to vote, but we have so much more work to do. Today in 2019 women are still fighting for a seat at the table, fighting to be heard, and fighting to overcome obstacles at the ballot box._
_Today we recognize the right to vote cannot be denied on the ‘basis of sex’, but sadly obstacles are still placed on non-binary folks, transgender folks, and others. Until we all are able to make it to the ballot box without obstacle we still have a lot of work to do._
_Something as easy for some of us as obtaining an I.D. isn’t easy for all of us. Finding a ride to the polls, registering to vote, or updating information isn’t easy for everyone. We have to recognize all of the ways that Republican leaders and those at the top try to keep us from exercising our right and we have to fight together to overcome those._
_Women make up over 50% of the population in West Virginia and yet, we are incredibly underrepresented in positions of leadership and elected office. With more women elected to office, we will be able to continue fighting forward for equal pay, paid parental leave, our right to make our own healthcare decisions, nondiscrimination laws, and more._
_In the West Virginia Legislature, we only have 8 Democratic women elected to office and they are all in the House of Delegates. They fight hard, but they can’t do it alone on one side of the statehouse._
_The best thing we can do today is to make sure as many women are registered to vote as possible and we need to make sure our friends are too. The more women that are voting and running for office, the more we can move forward to equality._ "
🗳 [You may go to the Secretary of State's Office to check your registration or register to vote today. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9391992/92601362/1202212403?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDhkMTFmOC0zYmM4LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t1Q_VG74bNajJXmdSExXI42jRRvG08Z4ztxDYFPn6c8=) 🗳

Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). This communication is not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Public employees may disregard. Contributions are not tax-deductible.
West Virginia Democratic Party
PO Box 11926
Charleston , WV 25339
United States

subject: The ONLY senator who's worked for Planned Parenthood

body:
I couldn't believe it when I saw it. Planned Parenthood was pushed out of Title X funding -- a major governmental health care program.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-aug2019?refcode=em190826pptitleX-nonop&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team,

I couldn't believe it when I saw it.

The Trump administration pushed Planned Parenthood out of Title X funding -- a major governmental health care program. Because Planned Parenthood informs patients about their full range of reproductive health care options, including abortions.

This has huge implications in our state. **In Minnesota alone, Planned Parenthood serves 90% of our Title X patients.** This domestic gag rule doesn't just affect Planned Parenthood's funding, but affects the availability of health care services to our friends and neighbors.

Planned Parenthood needs friends in the Senate now more than ever. **I am always in Planned Parenthood 's corner, and I need you to stand with me.**

**[I need 148 people to pitch in to my campaign before midnight so that I'm not replaced with extreme, anti-choice Republican Jason Lewis. subject: I owe you an explanation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
I'm asking you to donate to our campaign. Let me explain why this request is so important, especially this week. Here’s the truth: in less than a week, we’ll close the books on our August fundraising deadline -- and we’re **_behind_** on our goal. You know that we have a lot of work to do to win this primary, and every contribution you make to our campaign allows me to spend less time fundraising and more time talking with voters out on the campaign trail. With the presidential field shrinking by the week and the debates coming up next month, we cannot afford to fall short. So, I have to ask: **Can you add a contribution to our presidential campaign before Saturday’s end-of-month fundraising deadline? We need to raise $500,000 this week to get back on track. name: Elee Reeves
subject: This is for Mississippi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tate for Governor
body:
Your vote is always meaningful, but it is even more important in Tuesday's runoff election
Everyone,
I wanted to reach out and thank you for all of your commitment and support throughout this election. Tate and his team are working around the clock to win this election, and your support means a lot.

Your vote is always meaningful, but it is even more important in Tuesday's runoff election. Please, make a plan now to cast your vote. Polls close at 7:00 PM on Tuesday, so you may not be able to vote after work.

You can find all the tools you need to cast your vote on Tate's website: [https://tatereeves.com/get-involved/election-center/](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=9402dba6d0f644a983071fb68d2d1ad3&_e=9ZDvhB1FFXynEsE3h6ZMY92a7AIQh0ktQcjOmlTJdmCwVTXE-VsmnEMxF_iowSWzugxO94ZrDLoqZU6dXId-KuHLY8qWRERhz3Hw4EPiN9TyB3N78hDAK7GASaNL4NwBD2cy7JxlQFbGeUDdV0QCkqEt4ACaJZLnM7h_jBHlu7nYmw1fOPB8T5xWvy-mgpr2VthEa_vpvGRTuZdJcUD1RoKb0IwfN5h-of9tTE-B-r8E2BQTacyqcfcttOWPZtk0fwQr5MTyncuSX7pmtgcmpaxawsoy77IHB0wPFz5f0SM%3D)

My husband and I thank you for your support.

God Bless,
Elee Reeves

We have a big fundraising deadline at the end of the week, so we want to talk about what it means when you _invest_ in this campaign.

Billionaires do it in politics all the time. They use dark money to invest huge amounts into candidates that promise them big tax cuts after Election Day.

But investing in this campaign means something special. When you pitch in $3 to help this movement continue to grow, you join hundreds of thousands of other grassroots donors who want to see big, structural change for our country.

And those investments, every $3, or $10, or $28 contribution, mean we can build a country that works not just for the rich and powerful at the top, but for everybody -- you and your family, your neighbors in Cresco, and everybody who's been left out and left behind by Washington.

**[And right now, your investment is powerfully important. We have a big August fundraising goal we need to hit to expand our organizing across the country. name: Dan Baer
subject: I'll make this short and sweet:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Fox News just admitted that if Republicans lose my race, they could lose the Senate.
|
---

| | I know you're getting a lot of emails today, so I promise this will be quick:

[**I'm asking for $19 before the End of Month Deadline so I can fund the next round of ads and outreach for this historic campaign. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ec/232dfd1/9fa8f90/62a13266/1989365540/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190826_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

Fox News just admitted that if Republicans lose my race, they could lose the Senate.

That means our chances of taking back the Senate for Democrats rest entirely on Colorado.

If we lose my race, we're looking at another two years of obstructionist Mitch McConnell running the Senate. The Supreme Court, health care, tackling climate change, investing in education... it's all on the line.

Frankly, the stakes are extraordinarily high. That's why I keep asking for money -- not because I like it, but because we need it to win. And because donors like you really can make the difference!

So, I'm asking: Can I count on your support with $19 before my critical End of Month Deadline so we can win my race, flip the entire Senate, and oust Mitch McConnell?
| | [**Donate $10 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ec/232dfd1/9fa8f90/62a13267/1989365540/VEsE/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190826_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=10&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate $19 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ec/232dfd1/9fa8f90/62a13266/1989365540/VEsF/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190826_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate $25 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ec/232dfd1/9fa8f90/62a13264/1989365540/VEsC/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190826_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate $30 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ec/232dfd1/9fa8f90/62a13265/1989365540/VEsD/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190826_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=30&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate another amount now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ec/232dfd1/9fa8f90/62a13264/1989365540/VEsA/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190826_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

I know that we are sending a lot of emails. I'm grateful to everyone who has already chipped in (some of you 3, 4, or 5 times!).

Thanks,

Dan

---
[](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ec/232dfd1/9fa8f90/62a1326a/1989365540/VEsB/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://www.facebook.com/DanForColorado/") [](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ec/232dfd1/9fa8f90/62a1326b/1989365540/VEsO/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://twitter.com/danbbaer")

Colorado is the most important Senate race in the entire country according to Nate Silver and CNN. It's our only chance of flipping the Senate. And to win the most important Senate race, we need the most qualified candidate.

Dan served as an Ambassador under President Obama and as the head of the Colorado Department of Higher Education in Governor Hickenlooper's cabinet. If elected, he would be the first openly gay man to serve in Senate history.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but it's because we're running a grassroots campaign and rejecting corporate PAC money. We need your help to win -- and grassroots donations like yours truly make the difference. | | [**DONATE**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ec/232dfd1/9fa8f90/62a13268/1989365540/VEsP/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---
If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ec/232dfd1/9fa8f90/62a13269/1989365540/VEsHBQ/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/fewer-emails"). We hope you'll consider sticking with us long-term. But if you'd like to unsubscribe, please [click here](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ec/232dfd1/9fa8f90/62a1326e/1989365540/VEsHBA/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/unsubscribe").

| | Paid for by Dan for Colorado

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: Bumping this >> Trump's rally in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
On Friday, Senator Shaheen reached out because Donald Trump personally recruited his former campaign manager, Corey Lewandowski, to run for her New Hampshire Senate seat.
Everyone from FiveThirtyEight to CBS is saying that her race will decide Senate control, and her team had a rare match opportunity in effect. This meant that every dollar given would go twice as far toward winning in New Hampshire and taking back a Democratic Senate.
Unfortunately, we fell short of what we told Jeanne we'd help her raise. [**We 're desperately trying to make up ground and could really use your help. Will you please give $3 or as much as you can to help protect New Hampshire's other Democratic Senate seat from Donald Trump and Corey Lewandowski?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3bd/2a380d31/3c0e4526/f0c015/3194742264/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA4MjZfTVdINENKUy1raWNrLXJzX1JPIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20190826_MWH4CJS-kick-rs_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thank you,
Maggie Hassan's campaign staff
\--------------------Original Message--------------------
_Sender: Jeanne Shaheen
Sent To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Date: August 23, 2019_
I don't know where else to turn right now, everyone, so Maggie said that I could reach out.
Just over a week ago, Donald Trump personally recruited his former campaign manager Corey Lewandowski to run for this seat at his campaign rally in New Hampshire, and now we have until midnight tonight to raise the $50,000 we need to fight back. But we're still way short, and our match is about to expire.
Everyone from FiveThirtyEight to CBS is saying that our race in New Hampshire will decide Senate control. But The Washington Post just named this seat one of the most likely to flip -- so if we want to take back the Senate, we have to take full advantage of this match opportunity right now.
Mitch McConnell's right-wing group has already launched their first round of attack ads against us -- and as of today, GOP outside groups are spending more against us than all the other in-cycle Democratic senators combined. **They know that Democrats cannot take back the Senate if we lose here -- but missing this rapid-response goal would mean losing in New Hampshire.**
**With Republicans going all in on this race and just one day left until our match expires, every dollar could be the difference between a Republican and a Democratic Senate** :
[**Please, I 'm counting on you to give $3 before our match deadline at midnight: Every dollar will go twice as far toward winning in New Hampshire so we can take back the Senate for Democrats!**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3bd/2a380d31/3c0e4526/f0c015/3194742264/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA4MjZfTVdINENKUy1raWNrLXJzX1JPIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20190826_MWH4CJS-kick-rs_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thanks so much,
Jeanne
> [Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3bd/2a380d31/3c0e4526/f0c015/3194742264/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA4MjZfTVdINENKUy1raWNrLXJzX1JPIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20190826_MWH4CJS-kick-rs_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

| Patriot,
What we are witnessing is the complete chaos, disorganization, and total meltdown of the Democrat Party. The infighting and desire to be "the most progressive" in Congress, has me wondering, how can we get anything accomplished for the American people if you're too busy fighting amongst yourselves?
The short answer - YOU CAN'T! As our great late President Abraham Lincoln once said, "A house divided against itself, cannot stand."
Help me reject the squabbling, socialist house democrats and fight for our conservative values.

#
**A lot has happened in the last month.**

Outside special interest groups have spent hundreds of thousands on ads against me. Stacey Abrams has trained hundreds of “warriors” to work around the clock to turn Georgia into California. Abrams has even taken her field team to the national stage, with one mission: defeating President Trump and ending our Republican U.S. Senate majority.

Now, we’re coming up on our monthly fundraising deadline, **_and we’re behind our goal._** Given all of this recent news, it’s more critical than ever before that we get back on track.

[**Will you rush a donation right now to help us hit our goal?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=fbc110e895&e=02cd889ad3)

name: Cory Booker
subject: I want to hear directly from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| I know it's hard to believe, but it's already time to start preparing for the next DNC debate -- and I need your help. **Friend, time is running out, and I want to hear from you.[Can you take two minutes to fill out my debate stage priority survey? This is the most effective way to have your thoughts shared directly with me and our campaign.](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190826_CB_20190826-su-CB-debateprep-actives_actives_l1_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190826_CB_20190826-su-CB-debateprep-actives_actives_button1_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I've been on the trail for over six months -- talking to folks all across the country about what matters to them, hearing stories and ideas, and bringing their priorities to the forefront of this campaign. I've heard from people about the need to confront the existential threat of climate change and how we're going to address it as a country. And I've heard how we must combat white supremacy, implement gun violence prevention reforms, and stand up for reproductive rights. **[But this is only the start. With only two days left until the September debate stage is finalized, I want to hear directly from you. What issues do you most want to hear about in the next debate?](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190826_CB_20190826-su-CB-debateprep-actives_actives_l2_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** One of the founding principles of this grassroots campaign is that everyone deserves to have their voice heard. And that includes you. When I step onto that stage in a few weeks, I want to be ready -- and with your help, I will be. Thank you for your help,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190826_CB_20190826-su-CB-debateprep-actives_actives_button2_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b73/5fca0d19/73983ce2/29197aec/3226666244/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b73/5fca0d19/73983ce2/29197aeb/3226666244/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b73/5fca0d19/73983ce2/29197aea/3226666244/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b73/5fca0d19/73983ce2/29197ae9/3226666244/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b73/5fca0d19/73983ce2/29197aed/3226666244/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Team Tomlinson
subject: Trump nuking hurricanes?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9396154/92646036/1541696889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTg4Njc4MC01NGM4LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xE-sh63Zi19DhrfPTqqdx9AvaDI3RV8YXlRdshjI1Xk=&refcode=emheader_082619) | | Friend,

We promise we’re not making this up:

Last night, _Axios_ reported that President Trump has repeatedly asked senior Homeland Security and national security officials why we couldn’t drop nuclear bombs on hurricanes forming over the Atlantic to disrupt them.

Senator Perdue’s response? Silence. The 8 months it took for him and the president to get Hurricane Michael relief to reach Georgia obviously weren’t spent learning how to respond to future disasters.

clean_body: Did you see this exciting news? Out of 435 house seats up for grabs in 2020, ours made the top 10! | | | | | | Hi there. I hope you had a great weekend. Just want to make sure you saw this exciting news! Out of 435 house seats up for grabs in 2020, ours made the top 10! This is going to be one of the most watched and highly contested elections in our nation but I can't do it without your help! -Nicole \--------- Forwarded Message --------- From: Team Nicole Subject: Washington Post names Nicole's race among Top 10 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com | == | == | | | Friend, Big News! == Our campaign is picking up momentum and we're not going to back down now. It's disgraceful that our opponent has failed to stand up against those trying to take our country down the path of socialism and equally disturbing that he claims to be a moderate in the district but votes in lockstep with the squad in Washington. It's a record like this that shows he's is out of touch with our district and has made himself vulnerable. New York's 11th Congressional District is on the national radar, it's now up to us work together to flip this seat and preserve the American Dream for the future of this nation. | | | | | == | | | Stand with Nicole as she fights for our values. Let's win in 2020! == ==, ==, ==, == | | | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | Thank you, Team Nicole | | | PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL) | | | == == == | | Nicole for New York (FEDERAL) | PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306 | | Sent by mailto:nicole@nicoleforny.com

body:
Did you see Wilmot on the Daily Show with Trevor Noah? If not, check it out now!
# [](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1908-tn-wc?refcode=em190826&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Hey all,
[**Did you see Wilmot on the Daily Show with Trevor Noah? If not, check it out now!**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1908-tn-wc?refcode=em190826&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
One of Trevor Noah's correspondents came all the way out to Helena and did a profile on Wilmot's incredible story and how he became a leader in our community.
It's a great story... and of course, it's very funny.
[](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1908-tn-wc?refcode=em190826&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Wilmot is a bridge-builder -- that's clear. Montanans are smart, pragmatic people and when they see someone who has solutions, they gravitate towards them.
Wilmot doesn't need to rely on political grandstanding or sweeping generalizations -- he shows up as himself, rolls his sleeves up, gets to work and listens. That's why he won as Mayor of Helena, and that's why he will win against Senator Daines in 2020.
[**Take a moment to watch Wilmot 's segment on the Daily Show with Trevor Noah. Montanans are smart, pragmatic people and when they see someone who has solutions, they gravitate towards them. name: Greg Stanton
subject: tomorrow's election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
_Tomorrow_ is Phoenix's special election on two ballot measures, Propositions 105 and 106.

Should they pass, these out-of-state, dark money funded measures will slash funding for our city's public transit, parks, senior services, and libraries.

_As the former Mayor of Phoenix, I know these cuts will be devastating for our community._

**I 'm asking you to please take the time to go out to the polls tomorrow to VOTE NO on both Propositions 105 and 106.**

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/2fHdWIY7-g3OTbHgVi0TQ3MRthsUC475MYZbvVgoGEw=/NFrCP6iVT9Q7F3Pm5H-owbZrvudU9gnyuPIXERFUxYo=)

[**To find your polling place for tomorrow, or to see where you can drop off your early vote ballot, please refer to this online tool from the Citizens Clean Elections Commission »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2fHdWIY7-g3OTbHgVi0TQ3MRthsUC475MYZbvVgoGEw=/ADHyMBOiibKWJTh2_3OFz5bA034hAeyCAnNpf654JpE=)

Thanks for taking the time to vote for our community's future,

\-- _Greg Stanton_

name: Team Warner
subject: No time to lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We don't have any time to lose because things are happening fast.
|
---
| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d15c/53d9897e/52fc4f11/1c8e22f5/2751074576/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?refcode=20190826nd__190__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")
---
**[There's no time to lose!](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d15c/53d9897e/52fc4f11/1c8e22f4/2751074576/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?refcode=20190826nd__190__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**
Derek --

We don't have any time to lose because things are happening _fast_.

**First,** Scott Taylor announced his bid for Mark's Senate seat.

**Then,** President Trump launched the "Trump Victory Initiative" that has deployed GOP operatives across Virginia to help him win in 2020.

**Now,** we're relying on your help to make sure **Mark Warner stays in the Senate to fight for Virginians. We need to add 200 supporters to our grassroots network by the end of the month to stay on track. Will you help us get there by making a first-time donation today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d15c/53d9897e/52fc4f11/1c8e22f3/2751074576/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20190826nd__190__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")**
**[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d15c/53d9897e/52fc4f11/1c8e22f2/2751074576/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20190826nd__190__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")**
**[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d15c/53d9897e/52fc4f11/1c8e22f1/2751074576/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20190826nd__190__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")**
**[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d15c/53d9897e/52fc4f11/1c8e22f0/2751074576/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20190826nd__190__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d15c/53d9897e/52fc4f11/1c8e22ff/2751074576/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20190826nd__190__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d15c/53d9897e/52fc4f11/1c8e22fe/2751074576/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?refcode=20190826nd__190__&refcode2=express_lane_other")**
Of course, we know that Taylor is wrong for Virginia and that many Virginians reject Trump's divisive rhetoric and dangerous agenda. But still, _we cannot assume for a second_ that Democrats are safe in 2020. **Republicans have their eye on Virginia and their special interest mega-donors are already shelling out big bucks to help them win in the Commonwealth.** So we need to act _now_.

Mark is running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you. And we need to grow that network fast to keep up with the GOP's fundraising. **[Will you join our 200 new supporter goal by making your first donation today to keep Mark in the Senate?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d15c/53d9897e/52fc4f11/1c8e22fd/2751074576/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?refcode=20190826nd__190__&refcode2=ask3&amount=5")**

Mark is honored to serve Virginians every day, and with your support he'll continue to work hard in the Senate for years to come.

-- Team Warner

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d15c/53d9897e/52fc4f11/1c8e22fc/2751074576/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?refcode=20190826nd__190__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")****
---

name: Team Beto
subject: Need you to sign this: Beto's plan on gun violence and hate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Here are
the facts:

* 40,000 people each year die from gun violence.

* 329 million Americans own 390 million firearms.

* For 3 years straight, hate crimes are on the rise.

Beto knows full well the consequences of this president’s open hatred and
this Congress’ inaction. That’s why he’s released a sweeping platform to
address gun violence and curb the rise of hate and white nationalism in
America.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20190826-violence-and-hate/?t=1001&akid=51339%2E444211%2E0l1qV4 ]Can you sign your name to endorse Beto’s plan to combat hate and
violence in America? We need as many signatures as possible.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20190826-violence-and-hate/?source=ema20190826-51339&t=1002&akid=51339%2E444211%2E0l1qV4 ]Sign Beto's plan >>

+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| * Combating hate, white nationalism, and violence perpetuated by |
| media and online radicalization. |
| |
| * Create a nationwide gun licensing system and registry. |
| |
| * Requiring universal background checks at point of purchase, |
| closing loopholes, and implementing a federal option for Extreme |
| Risk Protection Orders, also known as a red flag law. |
| |
| * Banning weapons of war and implementing a voluntary buyback |
| program for handguns and a mandatory buyback program for banned |

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Women's Equality Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jawed [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jawed]
Peter,
Today, on Women’s Equality Day, we remember the tireless path towards women’s suffrage and long-fought battles that continue over the Equal Rights Amendment. These battles are far from over, and it's on all of us to remain vigilant and keep pushing for full participation in the social, political, and economic life of our country -- for all genders.
On January 21, 2017, I watched the great women of this country organize, march, and exercise their right to peacefully assemble against forces meant to oppress and hold them down. Watching the strong, independent women in my life speak their truths and stand up for the rights that their mothers and grandmothers struggled to achieve was one of the biggest motivating factors that pushed me to move back to my roots and ultimately run for Congress.
The fight for equality didn’t end with the adoption of the 19th Amendment to the Constitution, and it’s not over today. While the marches around the world were a historic moment in history, what matters most is what we do when the demonstrations are over, what we do when the headlines pass and the world's eyes aren’t focused on these important issues.
We must have meaningful policy change in this country. For this, to honor my grandmother, mother, sister, my nieces and all of the influential women of my life, I want to be on the front lines of fighting for equality and justice for all people in Iowa’s 4th Congressional District.
Standing tall for all,
J.D. Scholten
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jawed [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jawed]
Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
Scholten4Iowa
P.O. Box 3531
Sioux City, IA 51102
United States

subject: Englewood ENDS animal abuse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
I firmly believe it should be out of the question to euthanize our precious pets for population control. Do you agree? | | |
---
| |
---
| | | I need a critical favor: In honor of International Dog Day, I want to gather 50,000 responses-strong on my poll OPPOSING pet euthanasia. **I firmly believe it should be out of the question to euthanize our precious pets for population control. Do you agree?** **[YES!! >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce95/3eb3e2fc/5f903b74/744b8dbf/3353970870/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/animal-rights-survey?source=20190826_em_pet_b1_castro_all") [No](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce95/3eb3e2fc/5f903b74/744b8dbf/3353970870/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/animal-rights-survey?source=20190826_em_pet_b1_castro_all")**
---

I need a critical favor:

It breaks my heart to know that our precious pets are still being euthanized for population control.

[_**So in honor of International Dog Day, I 'm gathering 50,000 responses-strong demanding an END to pet euthanasia. Will you respond to my critical poll before midnight? >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce95/3eb3e2fc/5f903b74/744b8dbf/3353970870/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/animal-rights-survey?source=20190826_em_pet_b1_castro_all")

[](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce95/3eb3e2fc/5f903b74/744b8dbf/3353970870/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/animal-rights-survey?source=20190826_em_pet_b1_castro_all")
---

Let me be clear -- there is a special bond between people and animals:

\- They comfort us when we're in need
\- They help us heal when we're sick
\- They calm our anxiety
\- Bring us joy in moments of despair
\- Work alongside us during disaster relief
\- And nurture us every day as service animals

**I believe we have a critical responsibility to protect and care for them.**

_**[So today, in honor of International Dog Day, I 'm demanding an END to pet euthanasia for population control. I need 50,000 responses-strong in agreement. Will you add your name next to mine before midnight? >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce95/3eb3e2fc/5f903b74/744b8dbf/3353970870/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/animal-rights-survey?source=20190826_em_pet_b1_castro_all")**_

Thank you so much,

Julian

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce95/3eb3e2fc/5f903b74/744b8dbb/3353970870/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce95/3eb3e2fc/5f903b74/744b8dba/3353970870/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce95/3eb3e2fc/5f903b74/744b8db9/3353970870/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: I owe you an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
I won't sugarcoat it. Several qualified candidates have had to drop out. | | | Hi, Friends, I'll be upfront: [I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my presidential campaign. But first, let me explain.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac18/134673f2/c3b31ed/69965890/2078591740/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Because of arbitrary rules cooked up in a backroom at the DNC, I will not be on stage during the September debate.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac18/134673f2/c3b31ed/69965890/2078591740/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

The DNC is stifling debate at a time when we need it most. These rules have created exactly the wrong outcomes and they will not help us beat Donald Trump.

_Our fight is far from over._

I won't be stopped by the DNC's unprecedented and counterproductive process that rewards celebrities, billionaires who can buy their way in, and perma-candidates who have been running for decades.

[I am staying focused on what matters most:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac18/134673f2/c3b31ed/69965890/2078591740/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") [talking to voters and beating Trump.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac18/134673f2/c3b31ed/69965890/2078591740/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

This campaign has never been about being center stage.

It's about building the kind of country that our children deserve. Not one that separates families, or underfunds schools, or refuses to protect our planet.

As a senator from a purple state, I've never known an easy election.

I've spent my time in office listening to the diverse voices of my constituents and working toward ambitious and durable solutions to our greatest challenges.

If we're going to beat Trump -- that's the kind of leadership we need in 2020.

There's too much at stake to back down now.

[If you're with me, will you donate any amount to help me get to the next debate in October?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac18/134673f2/c3b31ed/69965890/2078591740/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**Send the DNC a message that the voters decide our nominee -- not some operatives in a backroom.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac18/134673f2/c3b31ed/69965890/2078591740/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Andrew Yang
subject: It’s time for action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
I won’t lie to you and tell you that we can stop climate change and its effects. What I will tell you is that we have a bold, aggressive plan to rethink how we address it and build a new economy -- a green economy -- around it.
| | | |
---
| Friend --

It’s easy to feel despair when we see our oceans filled with plastic waste, natural disasters becoming more frequent and more deadly, and our vital ecosystems like the Amazon being purposefully decimated to make way for unsustainable methods of making money.

**I won’t lie to you and tell you that we can stop climate change and its effects. What I will tell you is that we have a bold, aggressive plan to rethink how we address it and build a new economy -- a green economy -- around it.**

[Please read my plan below and add your name here if you’re ready to stand with me and fight for a new green economy. This is big change, and it’s going to take a lot of people standing with me to fight for it.](http://trk.klclick.com/wf/click?upn=-2BIAqDMuImSGKgCGE2sotQ4tK1lTpWNzsTJs-2BTmOjIju1hfDusThG-2BvSX-2BFNt1C7-2BfI2vcCz93vTVbWURNfGUIqmwdlVKJZsg-2FCYv0NpUJ6alSDbjPgvYwsEj6JiISMT4t7juoaZeKq9WkrErxAtDJd5Pi1bUSVfZ8K6GtJgzCmrARGzxy-2BK9FsCMFU6tFZL4QrWTQlnu1w1VsF5az8QgUWBvTp-2FEVZayr7uHOzVOr0wIdr4q-2FWwX3akio6wl0yWs-2FRlEUZ68D2T18G6AHi4eQwxYp8qAcIsgSLLnT7TJt98-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2F2S7fRaUcJH6qE-2BecLKpl4DvMWdyr3i-2FoZGVfDYJ-2FvxOTncMg96LUdfxlfWxI4EPuqNNifIshFGB4IIze9eTBuspqHMTcc-2B-2FvMjEDRRbPkEAdXy5HOIO1DE0tI9eJTJ5GoCOW-2FeaFnAZy8Q8TqKk3qUJ-2FcrnlNMceI0G-2F5-2BmljQY9UZskcHTFaeEwVZhqfsz5mleRK6UwoMDMsSjk1qRZtECjXSde7JYNT3wRUNNRD3Px-2BDraUtWk-2BnDSTWn5wqXCxaVwr2DjFEuKnPcukRZyeNUO65sC3dUpwCiEhSnzH0PlD4HK8xkL1i3uNTY-2FN49RfGEokuTkc1vB-2BcDOVCL4JA-3D-3D)

---
| Climate change is an existential threat to humanity. We’re too late to prevent a lot of the damage already created. It’s now time to adapt and thrive. Here’s how:

**Adapt to the changes already underway.**

Climate change and sea-level rise will force thousands of Americans to leave their homes. The communities hit hardest are already disadvantaged by their socioeconomic positions. We must change how FEMA responds to these catastrophes and allow for the sustainable rebuilding of our infrastructure. It’s imperative we assist people in migrating to safer areas escaping sea-level rise and mass floods, drought, fire, and earthquakes.

**Use geoengineering to cool the planet.**

Even if we are able to get net emissions down to zero tomorrow, the planet will continue to warm. We need to invest in and research solutions to cool the planet. The U.S. needs to be the world leader in research and geoengineering technologies -- from planting massive quantities of trees to seeding clouds to reflect more sunlight. We cannot allow other countries to make these important decisions for us.

**Move to a green economy.**

A new green, sustainable economy and society will be built in the coming years. The question is do we want the United States to make it? Or do we want to buy it from other countries? The United States must reprioritize in order to make green energy and technology an American staple. Shifting the location of the world’s energy source to the United States will boost America’s economy, take and reallocate power from Big Oil, and remove a massive source of revenue from terrorist organizations around the world. This plan must be a sustained, coordinated campaign to create solutions based on each industry’s specific needs. Our sector-by-sector plans include:
* **Energy.** We will end fossil fuel subsidies and public-land leases and actively oppose new infrastructure that isn’t sustainable. We will rebuild our rural towns by moving the focus from coal plants to renewable, clean energy creators. We will force the business sector into a race to the top to create energy solutions that will drive our economy.

* **Transportation.** We will implement new emissions standards requiring a fully electric vehicle suite with models starting by 2030. That means a large public investment in charging stations and grants to move public transportation options to renewable sources of energy and an investment in biofuels for air travel.

* **Agriculture.** In this new green economy, we will innovate in sustainable farming techniques coupled with solutions to capture methane emissions.

* **Infrastructure.** We must address infrastructure from every angle -- from planning to materials to technology that makes concrete carbon-neutral or negative. By making sustainable infrastructure a priority we will create good-paying jobs that can’t be automated or exported.

**Build a green world.**

Our standing in the world is a powerful responsibility. At the bare minimum, we must reenter the Paris Agreement -- no brainer. We must also use our leverage as the world’s largest economy to force other countries to also take aggressive, swift action to halt global emissions, renegotiate trade deals to meet our environmental standards, and stifle harmful projects.

As President, I will set an attainable goal of an economy-wide net-zero carbon emissions by the year 2049 with stepping stones set for 20x30 and 2040. Anything less is no longer realistic and downright dangerous.

[Join me in support of my bold climate action plan and let’s fight together for the green world we need to survive and thrive.](http://trk.klclick.com/wf/click?upn=02dhKE93GZuRor4noAOCTthsvMmKjWTt-2BkPpptZs7036JEp8I51Mqww63Sj9G-2FZXxhynaxJ8Iji6IiiUuhEL5rdMDwhr4i-2BmrsziXMBAFu7EfkHAxLIoD2B5CWXJ7ohPChpd8sMKZNbnSJHI128Li8VN1yRmFw-2BujlyxmYnt9L8zFtR3QYryXwtUJ0k59vVmiDd6OGbW5a189MmFwa9fGDsBd2GJC2LYmdlvuc9RuG9d-2BwG8gyihnwE9JBuGR8wZ9-2Bm4gwIAIlAMszl3-2BMLY8yf3MOHtJ21C0PQOJtK5CCo-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2F2S7fRaUcJH6qE-2BecLKpl4DvMWdyr3i-2FoZGVfDYJ-2FvxOTncMg96LUdfxlfWxI4EPuqNNifIshFGB4IIze9eTBuspqHMTcc-2B-2FvMjEDRRbPkEAdXy5HOIO1DE0tI9eJTJ5GoCOW-2FeaFnAZy8Q8TqKk3qdMxlM0d-2B6h5FaPAJhZY5gyJovdBQIaWkNAfd6tKXRGtvjV5PzLrKUuzlJJ3Th3qAIl3zq4jClIlC7e8aVxDkvFEHcCZvHoJA00LDojtSQCrnk2SQggfKJHGg1yJx7C-2FgpEwCIqs8yJqrs8flqZj-2F-2FLI-2FL4bDQa6lyIz7TLM490fvvjm-2FN0CZb9MVFTErlNPWw-3D-3D)

clean_body: I won’t lie to you and tell you that we can stop climate change and its effects. What I will tell you is that we have a bold, aggressive plan to rethink how we address it and build a new economy -- a green economy -- around it. | | | | | Friend -- It’s easy to feel despair when we see our oceans filled with plastic waste, natural disasters becoming more frequent and more deadly, and our vital ecosystems like the Amazon being purposefully decimated to make way for unsustainable methods of making money. I won’t lie to you and tell you that we can stop climate change and its effects. What I will tell you is that we have a bold, aggressive plan to rethink how we address it and build a new economy -- a green economy -- around it. | | Climate change is an existential threat to humanity. We’re too late to prevent a lot of the damage already created. It’s now time to adapt and thrive. Here’s how: Adapt to the changes already underway. Climate change and sea-level rise will force thousands of Americans to leave their homes. The communities hit hardest are already disadvantaged by their socioeconomic positions. We must change how FEMA responds to these catastrophes and allow for the sustainable rebuilding of our infrastructure. It’s imperative we assist people in migrating to safer areas escaping sea-level rise and mass floods, drought, fire, and earthquakes. Use geoengineering to cool the planet. Even if we are able to get net emissions down to zero tomorrow, the planet will continue to warm. We need to invest in and research solutions to cool the planet. The U.S. needs to be the world leader in research and geoengineering technologies -- from planting massive quantities of trees to seeding clouds to reflect more sunlight. We cannot allow other countries to make these important decisions for us. Move to a green economy. A new green, sustainable economy and society will be built in the coming years. The question is do we want the United States to make it? Or do we want to buy it from other countries? The United States must reprioritize in order to make green energy and technology an American staple. Shifting the location of the world’s energy source to the United States will boost America’s economy, take and reallocate power from Big Oil, and remove a massive source of revenue from terrorist organizations around the world. This plan must be a sustained, coordinated campaign to create solutions based on each industry’s specific needs. Our sector-by-sector plans include: Energy. We will end fossil fuel subsidies and public-land leases and actively oppose new infrastructure that isn’t sustainable. We will rebuild our rural towns by moving the focus from coal plants to renewable, clean energy creators. We will force the business sector into a race to the top to create energy solutions that will drive our economy. Transportation. We will implement new emissions standards requiring a fully electric vehicle suite with models starting by 2030. That means a large public investment in charging stations and grants to move public transportation options to renewable sources of energy and an investment in biofuels for air travel. Agriculture. In this new green economy, we will innovate in sustainable farming techniques coupled with solutions to capture methane emissions. Infrastructure. We must address infrastructure from every angle -- from planning to materials to technology that makes concrete carbon-neutral or negative. By making sustainable infrastructure a priority we will create good-paying jobs that can’t be automated or exported. Build a green world. Our standing in the world is a powerful responsibility. At the bare minimum, we must reenter the Paris Agreement -- no brainer. We must also use our leverage as the world’s largest economy to force other countries to also take aggressive, swift action to halt global emissions, renegotiate trade deals to meet our environmental standards, and stifle harmful projects. As President, I will set an attainable goal of an economy-wide net-zero carbon emissions by the year 2049 with stepping stones set for 20x30 and 2040. Anything less is no longer realistic and downright dangerous. | | \- Andrew Yang | | Can you make a donation today? Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people. | | ****Join the Yang Gang! If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application and someone from our team will reach out. | | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang | | | All rights reserved. New York, NY #HumanityFirst | No longer want to receive these emails? . Friends of Andrew Yang

subject: the grift that keeps on grifting

[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARxrWDqYmyEoyZU6pk3mTCWB&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190826_fr&n=1) Friend — you can’t make this up! It’s no secret that Donald Trump has been using the presidency to enrich his friends, his family, and himself. Since his inauguration in 2017, he’s visited his own properties _**362 times using taxpayer dollars**_ , including once with the Prime Minister of Japan where they were briefed on a North Korean missile launch _i_ _n the Mar-a-Lago dining room._ **Not exactly the place where you want to be discussing classified material.** So, naturally, when the United States gets a chance to host a group of world leaders here at home — an event that would be an economic boon for any location — where does he suggest? You guessed it – _**one of his failing properties.**_ This is just another example of how President Trump continues to abuse his position of power. **And in 2020, we have the chance to demand better.** [**Can you rush a $20.20 grassroots contribution today to show Donald Trump that you demand better form our commander in chief?**](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARxrWDqYmyEoyZU6pk3mTCWB&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190826_fr&n=2) — Team Weld | | [DONATE ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARxrWDqYmyEoyZU6pk3mTCWB&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190826_fr&n=3)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 5 big takeaways from President Trump at the G-7 Summit
body:
Today, President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump return home after attending this year’s G-7 Summit in Biarritz, France. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fa75f64b5c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 26, 2019
---
| | |
# **5 big takeaways from President Trump at the G-7 Summit**

**Today,** President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump return home after attending this year’s G-7 Summit in Biarritz, France. President Trump met with world leaders to strengthen our alliances, secure better trade deals, and—as always—keep the interests of the American people front and center on the global stage.
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3adf3c33e1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **The summit** began in 1975 as an opportunity for world leaders to meet face-to-face and find solutions to the most pressing modern-day global challenges.

**This year** was no exception, as President Trump worked with our allies to chart a course toward even more prosperity both here at home and around the world. Here are a few of the biggest takeaways from the trip:

* **[A message of unity.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6a8dbcbc41&e=3ee4985eea)** President Trump and President Emmanuel Macron of host nation France held a joint press conference earlier today. Over the weekend, they worked together to achieve progress on a number of fronts, including global security, fair trade practices, and better economic opportunity for all. “I want to thank you very much, Mr. President, for the incredible job you did. This is a truly successful G-7,” President Trump said.

* **[Securing a billion-dollar trade deal.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d0b5bae381&e=3ee4985eea)** One of the biggest wins from the summit was President Trump’s announcement of locking in a trade agreement with Prime Minister Shinzo Abe of Japan. The deal secures market access for a number of American agricultural goods, and Japan has agreed to purchase large sums of our farmers’ corn.

* **[Promoting USMCA.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e6c55c7448&e=3ee4985eea)** With Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau by his side, President Trump talked about the importance of expanding America’s trading partnership with our neighbors by passing the U.S.–Mexico–Canada Agreement. With both Canada and Mexico having essentially finalized it, President Trump noted that it’s time for American lawmakers to do the same. “Our farmers love it, the unions love it, the workers love it, manufacturers love it . . . hopefully that’ll be put to a vote very soon.”

* **[Developing stronger trade with Europe.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=28b260eb96&e=3ee4985eea)** While meeting with Chancellor Angela Merkel of Germany, President Trump discussed how best to meet global and regional security challenges and previewed even better trade relations to come with Germany and the European Union. Germany is “a great trading partner,” he said. “And we probably think we’re going to be upping the trade over a very short period of time.”

* **[Helping to reduce India-Pakistan tensions.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cbd6293b11&e=3ee4985eea)** In his meeting with Prime Minister Narendra Modi of India, President Trump reaffirmed the need for dialogue between India and Pakistan and also worked to build on the great economic relations between our nations.

[In photos: President Trump attends the G-7 Summit in Biarritz, France.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c9b5c5113c&e=3ee4985eea)

**At the G-7:** [President Trump is working with our allies to build a better future](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b02950b718&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
| **President Trump joins G-7 Leaders and Extended G-7 members as they pose for the “family photo” at the G-7 Extended Partners Program Sunday evening at the Hotel du Palais Biarritz** | August 25, 2019
---
|
