name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Your right to vote should be yours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
Across our country, voters face a growing threat from a time-tested voter suppression tactic called voter purging. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa50b/34a064cc/1851c74b/7031ec0/4247932207/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - In the aftermath of _Shelby County v. Holder_ , jurisdictions formerly covered under Section 5 of the Voting Rights Act, joined by states throughout the country, have raced to reinstate or create new hurdles for voters. Across our country, voters face a growing threat from a time-tested voter suppression tactic called voter purging, where seemingly neutral rules for removing voters who have died or left the state have become tools for political benefit to silence the voices of thousands of voters. Recently released data from the federal Election Assistance Commission shows more than 17 million voters across the country were removed from the rolls between 2016 and 2018, with some of the highest rates of removal in Indiana, Wisconsin, Virginia, and jurisdictions like Georgia formerly covered by Section 5 of the VRA. Historically, Georgia has been one of the most aggressive states in the nation in leveraging the lack of federal oversight to use both law and policy to target voters of color. Under Governor* Brian Kemp's post-_Shelby_ reign as Secretary of State, he removed over 1.4 million voters from the rolls, including purging half a million voters in a single day in 2017, an 8% reduction in Georgia's voting population. Of those voters, an estimated 107,000 were removed through an arguably unconstitutional application of the "use it or lose it" statute, where Kemp deemed voters ineligible to exercise their constitutional right because they chose not to vote in certain elections or failed to return a postcard. But as our federal lawsuit argues: purging voters from the rolls because of voter inactivity violates the U.S. Constitution and penalizes infrequent voters, who are disproportionately young, low-income, and people of color, as well as voters who make a conscious choice not to vote in certain elections. And in states like Georgia that do not allow same-day registration, voters too often learn they have been purged from the rolls only when they show up to vote and are denied their right to do so. **[If you share our belief that voters should be able to remain on the rolls free from the threat of improper purging, will you chip in to Fair Fight today and support our work to protect the vote?](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa50b/34a064cc/1851c74b/7031ec1/4247932207/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE082619PURGE")** Now more than ever, we need modern-day protections that create requirements for pre-clearance so that we can dismantle the broad reach of voter suppression. \- Team Fair Fight **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa50b/34a064cc/1851c74b/7031ec1/4247932207/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE082619PURGE")**
---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa50b/34a064cc/1851c74b/7031ece/4247932207/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa50b/34a064cc/1851c74b/7031ecf/4247932207/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa50b/34a064cc/1851c74b/7031ecc/4247932207/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

name: M.E. Smith, Team Hick
subject: The latest poll in this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
When we say that Cory Gardner is one of the most beatable Republicans in the country, here's what we mean: | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714ed/691c9bd/6e479503/11a7bb91/1186523314/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team--a quick note as we head into week 2 of this campaign.

When we say that Cory Gardner is one of the most beatable Republicans in the country, here's what we mean: [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190826_MES_20190826-fr-MES-poll-all_all_i1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=") That's right. As of the latest poll, we're leading by 13 points.

But those poll numbers are no reason to sit back and relax. I've been in Colorado politics for a while, and let me tell you--things can change on a dime.

**The other side is seeing the same numbers we are. It won 't take long for his corporate PAC donors and the GOP establishment to swoop in and try to smear John and our campaign.**

Gardner has nearly $5 million in the bank. We need to start closing that gap so we're ready to fend off the attacks that'll fly our way as the GOP pulls out every trick they have to keep this seat.

[**_An early donation helps a lot more than one down the road, because it helps us prepare earlier for what 's coming. Today, can you chip in to help maintain this lead?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190826_MES_20190826-fr-MES-poll-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
M.E.

M.E. Smith
Campaign Manager
Hickenlooper for Colorado [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190826_MES_20190826-fr-MES-poll-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=")
